schedule_description: Restaurant pages have a reservation widget with date picker, time slot grid, and party size selector. Select date/time/party → click Reserve Now → fill guest info → confirm.
flow_steps: Navigate to the restaurant page on resy.com
Set party size using the party size dropdown/selector
Set the date using the date picker or calendar arrows
Browse available time slots in the time grid
Click on the desired time slot
Fill in guest name, email, phone on the reservation form
Add special requests if there's a notes field
Wait for the confirmation page to load
obstacles: Cookie consent banner may appear on first visit — dismiss it
Some restaurants require a Resy account to reserve — report LOGIN_REQUIRED
Time slots may show as 'Notify' instead of available — means no availability
High-demand restaurants may show no availability for the requested date
The reservation widget may take 3-5 seconds to load
Some restaurants require a credit card hold for the reservation — report PAYMENT_REQUIRED
If the time grid shows 'No times available', try the next or previous day
